description: Implement FGAP-142: export citation-rot-scanner.ts's CITATION_RE (or a small detection-core function) via a package subpath so scan-comment-citations.ts and any future consumer reuse it instead of hand-duplicating the regex. Extend the scanner to also detect tracker-ID citations inside JSDoc/line comments in source files, delta-scoped: only a citation introduced in the current diff/working-tree change is flagged (via a git-diff-aware check against the base branch or staged changes), never a pre-existing one -- so the gate can run today without retroactively blocking on the ~500+ instances FGAP-136's rollout already cleaned up. Wire the delta-scoped check into pre-commit alongside the existing check-changelog/parity-check/check-config-schema gates.
acceptance_criteria: CITATION_RE (or an equivalent detection-core function) is exported from citation-rot-scanner.ts via a package subpath; scan-comment-citations.ts is updated to import and reuse it rather than hand-duplicating the regex
the scanner's detection surface extends to JSDoc/line comments in source files, gated delta-scoped: only citations introduced in the current change are flagged
running the new gate against the current monorepo (no new comment citations introduced) passes cleanly -- the ~500+ already-cleaned pre-existing instances do not retroactively block anything
introducing a NEW tracker-ID citation in a code comment (test fixture) causes the gate to fail with a clear message
the new gate is wired into .husky/pre-commit alongside check-changelog/parity-check/check-config-schema
build, check, and full test suite exit 0
